item.title: Apple beats Q1 estimates
item.description: Apple Inc. reported quarterly results that exceeded analyst expectations on both revenue and earnings per share.

item.title: Apple announces new iPhone subscription bundle
item.description: Apple unveiled a new subscription bundle that combines iPhone hardware with services.

item.title: Cupertino tech giant raises dividend by 5%
item.description: Apple's board approved a 5% dividend hike alongside a fresh share-buyback authorization.

item.title: Analyst upgrades AAPL to buy on services momentum
item.description: A major Wall Street firm raised its rating on Apple shares citing accelerating services growth.

item.title: Apple supply chain shifts toward India
item.description: Apple is reportedly accelerating manufacturing diversification away from China.

item.title: Apple Vision Pro 2 rumored for late 2026
item.description: Supply chain leaks point to a refreshed Vision Pro arriving by Q4 2026.
